tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c (6.0%), indicating prediabetes, and slightly increased LDL cholesterol (109 mg/dL). Other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile, are within normal limits. Recommend lifestyle modification and follow-up for glycemic control and cardiovascular risk assessment.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
